frontmatter.title: Hello World — Welcome to My Blog
frontmatter.description: The very first post on my new Gatsby-powered blog.

nodes.excerpt:
Welcome! This is my first blog post, built with Gatsby and deployed on GitHub Pages.

I created this blog to share my thoughts on software development, and to document what I learn along the way.
